---
title: "Kate Danby"
---

## Kate Danby

**Dates:** (1850-1940)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

A Gosling as ‘Kitten’ in December 1876, she was the daughter of the vicar of Weston-by-Welland, near Market Harborough,  the Rev. Samuel Danby. She married (1877) Philip Thomas Richards, R.N.. 

[1861 census, when her father was Vicar of Christ Church, Belper;  information sent to the CMYF by Mr James Phillips-Evans].

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
